title: Ragawise
description: Light-weight real-time raga recognition system in a web browser using JavaScript and D3.js. Best music hack award at HAMR, ISMIR 2015.

title: YIN.js
description: JavaScript implementation of the YIN pitch detection algorithm for real-time pitch tracking in the browser.

title: Classifying Glassdoor Reviews
description: ML-based classification of Glassdoor employee reviews to extract structured signals about company culture and sentiment for private equity analysis.

title: Unraveling Competitive Relationships Across Private Companies
description: Graph-based approach to mapping competitive dynamics across private companies using alternative data sources.

title: Tracking Post-Pandemic Normalcy: NYC Noise Complaints
description: Using NYC noise complaint data as an alternative signal to track post-pandemic urban recovery and normalcy.

title: Tracking the US Electricity Demand
description: Analysis of US electricity demand patterns using time-series techniques to derive macroeconomic signals.

title: Hindify
description: A tool that transforms any audio song to have characteristics of Indian classical music. Used EchoNest Analysis, Remix, and Freesound APIs. Best hack award by EchoNest (Spotify), Music Hack Day Barcelona 2013.

title: Hodorizer
description: Automatically detects and replaces speech utterances in a song with the word Hodor while mimicking the pitch of the original singing. Used EchoNest API and Essentia. Music Hack Day Barcelona 2014.

title: Music Spaghetti
description: A tool that plays any song infinitely by seamlessly seeking from one music section to another while maintaining temporal continuity. Presented to the engineering team at SoundCloud.

title: Videofy
description: Automatic video generation for audio songs using Google Street View, EchoNest, and LastFM APIs. Music Hack Day Barcelona 2012.

title: Dunya
description: Web platform for exploring CompMusic's Indian art music corpora — melodic analysis, raga recognition, and music browsing.
